title: USDA Weekly Crop Progress Reporting Begins
summary: Planting has begun for barley, corn, cotton, oats, rice, sorghum, spring wheat, and sugarbeets, according to the first Crop Progress report issued for the 2021 planting season by U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). By this time last year, 2% of the corn...

title: Indigenous Music – 4/05/21
summary: April 5, 2021 This week, we explore an eclectic mix of Indigenous music from some of our favorite artists and some exciting new voices. Spanning genres from blues to hip-hop, these tracks dig deep, buzz with life, and celebrate culture. Tune in for a mix of artists representing tribes from all over...

title: Spirit of KUAC Award Goes to Mark Rippy
summary: Volunteer Mark Rippy has been chosen to receive the Spirit of KUAC award for 2021. Mark has been an on-air host for KUAC FM for 10 years. A former high school teacher, he had experience working in commercial radio in the 1970s and 1980s. Upon retirement, he decided to volunteer with KUAC. “It’s abou...
